Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Writen Discovery & Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF JOSE ORTIZ' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Writen Discovery & Request For Sanctions IS OFF CALENDAR. TO BE RENOTICED IN DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Continued To Mar-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Heather E. Borlase of Bayer & Borlase, 558-9960, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Kurt Hendershott of Chapman & Intrieri, 510-558-9800, appearing for defendants and moving parties

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS ANDERSON ENTERPRISES, INC. and MICHAEL WITT'S Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration is denied. Defendant has not presented admissible evidence that successfully rebuts plaintiff's showing that the arbitration agreement was induced by fraud. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
